title: pavonia horrida
intro: Pavonia horrida, also known as the Rough Pavonia or Mexican Rose Mallow, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pavonia horrida include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat wounds and promote tissue repair.
